# delegate

**Instance Property**

The camera device view delegate.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBOutlet @MainActor unowned(unsafe) var delegate: (any IKCameraDeviceViewDelegate)! { get set }
```

## Discussion

The delegate must conform to the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKCameraDeviceViewDelegate] protocol.
